product: Lakehouse Federation sharing and default storage
tagline: Delta Sharing on Lakehouse Federation is in Beta, allowing Delta Sharing data providers to share foreign catalogs and tables.
what_it_does: Delta Sharing on Lakehouse Federation is in Beta, allowing Delta Sharing data providers to share foreign catalogs and tables. By default, data must be temporarily materialized and stored on default storage. Currently, users must manually enable the Delta Sharing for Default Storage – Expanded Access feature in the account console to use Lakehouse Federation sharing.
why_it_matters: For Databricks to Databricks shares, the table's Delta log is also shared to improve performance.
plain_summary: Delta Sharing on Lakehouse Federation is in Beta, allowing Delta Sharing data providers to share foreign catalogs and tables. By default, data must be temporarily materialized and stored on default storage.
key_takeaway: Delta Sharing on Lakehouse Federation is in Beta, allowing Delta Sharing data providers to share foreign catalogs and tables.
